item.title: Is There a Cost Savings?
item.description: A straightforward look at whether there is a cost savings in this video. What factors should buyers consider when comparing price, features, and ownership costs?

media:content.media:title: Is There a Cost Savings?
media:content.media:description: A straightforward look at whether there is a cost savings in this video. What factors should buyers consider when comparing price, features, and ownership costs?

item.title: Car Dealer Test Goes Wrong
item.description: A buyer tried to test a dealership desk, but it did not go as planned. A short look at dealer tactics, hidden fees, and why buyers should stay alert. What would you watch for first?

media:content.media:title: Car Dealer Test Goes Wrong
media:content.media:description: A buyer tried to test a dealership desk, but it did not go as planned. A short look at dealer tactics, hidden fees, and why buyers should stay alert. What would you watch for first?

item.title: Trade-In Tactics Dealers Don’t Want You to Know
item.description: A small move at the desk can change the whole deal. Learn a practical trade-in tactic that may affect pricing and negotiations. What should buyers watch for before signing?

media:content.media:title: Trade-In Tactics Dealers Don’t Want You to Know
media:content.media:description: A small move at the desk can change the whole deal. Learn a practical trade-in tactic that may affect pricing and negotiations. What should buyers watch for before signing?

item.title: The Payment Question Dealers Ask First
item.description: It’s not always about helping you—it can change the whole deal. A look at why the first payment question matters in car buying and how it can affect the deal. What should buyers watch for?

media:content.media:title: The Payment Question Dealers Ask First
media:content.media:description: It’s not always about helping you—it can change the whole deal. A look at why the first payment question matters in car buying and how it can affect the deal. What should buyers watch for?

item.title: What a Crash Can Reveal About a Used Car
item.description: Past accidents can leave behind clues that tell a bigger story about a vehicle’s condition, repairs, and long-term reliability. What hidden signs should buyers look for before making a purchase?

media:content.media:title: What a Crash Can Reveal About a Used Car
media:content.media:description: Past accidents can leave behind clues that tell a bigger story about a vehicle’s condition, repairs, and long-term reliability. What hidden signs should buyers look for before making a purchase?

item.title: 4 Dealer Finance Fees to Watch For
item.description: If dealers introduce charges late in the process, slow the deal down and ask for a full explanation of every fee. What should buyers review before signing?

media:content.media:title: 4 Dealer Finance Fees to Watch For
media:content.media:description: If dealers introduce charges late in the process, slow the deal down and ask for a full explanation of every fee. What should buyers review before signing?

item.title: Why Some Buyers May Skip a Kia
item.description: A straightforward look at reasons some shoppers may avoid buying a Kia, with a focus on real-world ownership considerations. What should car buyers weigh before making a decision?

media:content.media:title: Why Some Buyers May Skip a Kia
media:content.media:description: A straightforward look at reasons some shoppers may avoid buying a Kia, with a focus on real-world ownership considerations. What should car buyers weigh before making a decision?

item.title: Questions to Avoid on a Car Lot
item.description: Some common questions can unintentionally weaken your negotiating position when shopping for a vehicle. Which ones might cost you leverage before the deal even begins?

media:content.media:title: Questions to Avoid on a Car Lot
media:content.media:description: Some common questions can unintentionally weaken your negotiating position when shopping for a vehicle. Which ones might cost you leverage before the deal even begins?

item.title: A Surprising Find Inside This Vehicle
item.description: A closer look at an unexpected feature or detail found inside this vehicle. What makes it stand out, and is it something buyers should know about?

media:content.media:title: A Surprising Find Inside This Vehicle
media:content.media:description: A closer look at an unexpected feature or detail found inside this vehicle. What makes it stand out, and is it something buyers should know about?

item.title: Customer Tries to Scam a $120,000 Deal
item.description: A dealership story about a customer attempting to scam a $120,000 deal. What happened, and what can buyers learn from it?

media:content.media:title: Customer Tries to Scam a $120,000 Deal
media:content.media:description: A dealership story about a customer attempting to scam a $120,000 deal. What happened, and what can buyers learn from it?
